mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transactions (user_id, category_id, asset_id, type, amount, memo, txn_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{assetId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{memo}, #{txnDate})
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.type, t.amount, t.memo, t.txn_date, t.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.icon AS category_icon, c.color AS category_color, t.asset_id, a.name AS asset_name, t.created_at FROM transactions t JOIN categories c ON c.id = t.category_id AND c.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN assets a ON a.id = t.asset_id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.txn_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND t.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY t.txn_date DESC, t.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE transactions SET category_id = #{categoryId}, asset_id = #{assetId}, type = #{type}, amount = #{amount}, memo = #{memo}, txn_date = #{txnDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'INCOME' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'EXPENSE' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_expense, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'INCOME' THEN amount WHEN type = 'EXPENSE' THEN -amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS balance, #{year} AS year, #{month} AS month FROM transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND txn_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND deleted_at IS NULL
